decisions.decision: BQ data never double-counted - use IF() auto-detection for two formats

Session-wide aggregation bug produced billions of tokens

decisions.decision: ROW_NUMBER() for largest session per user by total_tokens
decisions.rationale: User wanted one session per user, not all sessions

decisions.decision: First-round spans via name NOT LIKE '%/%'
decisions.rationale: Multi-round spans have format like 'Claude Inference (4/6)'

decisions.decision: Anthropic SDK in notebook for session summarization
decisions.rationale: Simpler than external tool, claude-sonnet-4 for cost efficiency
